seoTitle: CXMT News & Updates | Product Releases & Events | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Latest news from CXMT including new DRAM releases, technology updates, and industry events. Stay informed about memory solutions.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest CXMT product announcements?
faqs.answer: Latest CXMT product announcements are available through: (1) This news page - regularly updated with new releases; (2) LiTong newsletter - subscribe for email updates; (3) Product pages - show latest releases; (4) Technical support - contact FAE for roadmap information. As an authorized distributor, LiTong receives advance notice of new products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's newsletter and check this page regularly for updates.

faqs.question: How do I get notified about CXMT events and webinars?
faqs.answer: Stay informed about CXMT events through: (1) LiTong events page - upcoming webinars and seminars; (2) Email notifications - subscribe to event alerts; (3) Technical seminars - regional training on memory technology; (4) Online webinars - virtual training sessions. LiTong hosts technical seminars featuring CXMT memory solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's event notifications for invitations to technical seminars.

articles.title: CXMT Releases 24Gb DDR5 DRAM for High-Capacity Servers
articles.summary: New 24Gb DDR5 dies enable up to 96GB RDIMM modules, providing 50% more capacity than 16Gb solutions for data center applications.
content: CXMT has announced the release of 24Gb DDR5 DRAM dies, enabling unprecedented memory capacity for servers and data centers.
Available in RDIMM, MRDIMM, and TFF MRDIMM formats.

articles.title: CXMT LPDDR5X-10667 Enters Mass Production
articles.summary: Industry's fastest LPDDR5X at 10667Mbps now in mass production for flagship smartphones and AI devices.
content: CXMT has announced mass production of LPDDR5X-10667, the industry's fastest mobile memory.
Validated on major SoC platforms including Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 and Dimensity 9300.

articles.title: CXMT Launches MRDIMM for High-Performance Computing
articles.summary: New MRDIMM modules deliver doubled bandwidth for AI training, HPC, and high-performance servers.
content: CXMT has launched MRDIMM (Multiplexed Rank DIMM) modules for bandwidth-intensive applications.
Compatible with Intel Xeon Scalable (Granite Rapids) and future AMD EPYC platforms.

articles.title: LiTong Partners with CXMT as Authorized Distributor
articles.summary: LiTong adds CXMT DRAM memory to product portfolio, providing local inventory and technical support for DDR5 and LPDDR5X solutions.
content: LiTong is pleased to announce a distribution partnership with CXMT (ChangXin Memory Technologies), adding DDR5 and LPDDR5X memory products to our portfolio.
As an authorized CXMT distributor, LiTong provides:
- Full product line: DDR5, LPDDR5X, DDR4, LPDDR4X
- Comprehensive technical support from memory experts
- Application engineering and design review services
This partnership enhances LiTong's memory solutions offering and provides customers with high-quality domestic memory alternatives.

articles.title: CXMT Introduces LPCAMM2 Modules for Next-Gen Laptops
articles.summary: New LPCAMM2 module format enables upgradeable LPDDR5X memory for thin-and-light laptops and embedded systems.
content: CXMT has introduced LPCAMM2 modules, bringing upgradeable LPDDR5X memory to laptops.
Target platforms: Intel Lunar Lake, AMD Strix Point, and future mobile platforms.
